danger_signals.visual_form: Unspecified enemy sprites in level design
danger_signals.meaning: Threats that deal damage on contact; avoidance required
Temporal constraint on level completion; failure if time expires

danger_signals.visual_form: Spot face icon that bends forward progressively with damage
danger_signals.meaning: Visual feedback for accumulated damage; face eventually falls off screen at critical health

safety_signals.visual_form: Spot collectible icons placed throughout level
safety_signals.meaning: Progress toward level goal; required quantity accumulation unlocks caged Spots
Safe progression point; allows respawn at this location on life loss

safety_signals.visual_form: Hidden letters spelling 'UNCOLA' in bonus stages
safety_signals.meaning: Collectible that grants Continue item for life restoration

safety_signals.visual_form: Bubble projectiles thrown by Spot in any direction
safety_signals.meaning: Player offensive capability; method to neutralize enemies

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: 7 Up brand mascot; soda bubble imagery
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Soda bubble aesthetic throughout level design; branded soft drink theme

faction_indicators.color_identity: Identical red circular characters to player
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Caged or confined variants of player character
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Cages throughout levels that require collected Spots as payment to unlock

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Enemies distinguished from player Spot through contrasting sprite design
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Distributed throughout levels as obstacles and combat encounters

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level layout design, enemy placement, collectible distribution density
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Increasing quantity requirements of collected Spots as game progresses; difficulty scaling through level design

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Spot face health indicator gradually bending forward; face falls off-screen when depleted
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player control remains functional until health fully depletes; visual warning before imminent failure state

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Collected Spot count versus required threshold; caged Spot visual state (locked/unlocked)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Caged Spots remain imprisoned until collection target met; level completion triggered after all caged Spots freed

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Bonus stage environment with hidden letter collectibles spelling 'UNCOLA'
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Bonus stage only accessible upon successful level completion with sufficient Spot collection; hidden letters restore Continue lives
Failure condition if timer reaches zero; creates urgency in navigation and combat decisions

environmental_storytelling.example: 7 Up soft drink aesthetic integrated throughout level design—soda bubbles as attack mechanic, UNCOLA slogan integrated into bonus stage letter collection system, red Spot character design matching brand identity

Imprisoned identical Spot characters in cages establish rescue mission narrative; cages serve as visual goal markers and require currency (collected Spots) to unlock, communicating both story context and mechanical progression
Multiple imprisoned Spots identical to player character suggest a population of Spot beings; rescue mechanic implies disaster/capture event that scattered them across levels
Spot face health indicator's progressive deformation (bending forward, eventual fall) creates physical narrative of accumulating damage without dialogue; communicates stakes of enemy encounters

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Can jump, climb surfaces by jumping in front of them, throw soda bubbles in any direction
Face health indicator bends forward; accumulates visual deformation with each hit
Face falls off-screen; loss of life occurs; respawn at last flagpole checkpoint
Remains stationary in cage; no interaction until collection threshold met
Becomes freeable; cage opens, allowing player to progress level exit
Distribute damage on contact; fire projectiles at player; can be defeated by soda bubble projectiles
Visible countdown timer creates escalating pressure; failure state if reaches zero

notes: Cool Spot is a brand-integrated platformer where visual communication is tightly coupled with 7 Up marketing narrative. The game uses character duplication (multiple Spots), imprisonment metaphor (cages), and progressive visual degradation (health face) as primary storytelling tools. No faction conflict or political situation exists in traditional sense; instead, the narrative frames a rescue operation with branded mascot. World state changes are communicated through collectible counters, cage lock states, and visual damage accumulation rather than environmental transformation. The 'UNCOLA' bonus stage letter system directly integrates brand slogan into mechanical progression. Design relies on visual clarity of damage (health face), collectible feedback (Spot count), and goal visualization (caged prisoners) rather than complex state indicators.
